steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the word “praising” combined with the glowing descriptors—”especially pointed,” “heartbreaking and inspiring.” The critics are expressing approval of these films.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Commended” means to express approval or praise—the exact action the critics perform with these films. The other choices either miss what the critics actually did (“inspired,” “overlooked”) or contradict the positive tone (“satirized”). That matches choice D — D is correct.
